purpose: Define the external validation surface required before Block 3 source/event-state methods can claim cross-domain generality.
claim_boundary: This matrix is a validation contract, not evidence that a method already generalizes.
Public-pack metrics are monitoring artifacts until every expected family is complete and normalized comparisons are added.
Industry transfer claims require held-out external datasets plus no-regression checks on Block 3.

public_pack_families.minimum_gate: all horizons complete; no run errors
all horizons complete; no run errors
all horizons complete; no run errors
all horizons complete; no run errors
all horizons complete; no run errors
all horizons complete; no run errors
all horizons complete; no run errors

block3_required_gates: strict row-key counterfactual for source/text/EDGAR deltas
source-regime calibration improvement without point-accuracy overclaim
formal temporal rerun for weak cells, not diagnostic row-order split only
coverage weak-cell audit below 0.88 and below 0.90
promotion_rules: No NeurIPS-level method claim from literature plausibility alone.
No source mechanism claim unless row-key strict counterfactual and formal temporal evidence agree.
No generalization claim until public-pack expected families are complete with zero run errors.
No point-accuracy claim unless paired MAE wins dominate losses on the relevant head/horizon slice.
